title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that competing with AI on knowledge acquisition is a losing proposition for humans, and that true intelligence in the AI age lies in curiosity and human judgment. He draws on Ramanujan's legacy to advocate for identifying unconventional talent and fostering discovery-driven thinking.
